description: A sepia-toned maritime scene depicting a naval engagement. A steamship with masts and a smokestack fires cannon, producing flashes and smoke. Small boats with crews row in the foreground. In the background, a hilly coastline with fortifications is visible, also producing cannon fire with bright flashes. The water is calm despite the battle. The rendering is detailed in ink or wash technique, creating an atmospheric documentary quality.

_meta.title: Steamship Kolkhida fighting the Turkish boats at the St. Nicholas Fort near Poti, Georgia during the Crimean War in 1853
